name: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf
address: 2510 W Farmington Rd, West Peoria, IL 61604
about: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf is located upstairs at The Country Club BBQ restaurant in West Peoria, IL. It offers indoor golf simulator rentals with aboutGolf technology and food/beverage service. The venue features two simulators available for individual or joint rental, with pricing set at $40/hour per simulator or $80/hour for both. It is suitable for individual practice, group outings, and lessons, with a focus on convenience and accessibility.
why_golfers_like_it: Full restaurant service with food and drink available while playing
Convenient location within a popular BBQ restaurant
Technology provides accurate shot tracking and swing analysis
Flexible pricing allows for cost-effective group sessions
Accommodates both casual players and serious practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service available; catering options for large groups
Full service bar with drink specials; servers can bring drinks to simulators

simulator_hardware.notes: aboutGolf simulators provide accurate shot tracking within 1%

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs, but they must be clean before using the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside alcohol and food are not allowed. The venue offers full restaurant and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One person takes less than an hour to play 18 holes. Four players take about 4 hours on one simulator or 2 hours on both simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as 'Fun For All Ages' and offers food and beverages for kids and adults.
